parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant Admin
participant "Webhook\nServer" as WebhookServer
participant Consumer

== Register webhook ==
autonumber
Admin -> WebhookServer: Register webhook\nconsumer
WebhookServer -> Admin: OK

== Event received ==
autonumber 3
[-> WebhookServer: Event
WebhookServer -> WebhookServer: Store event\nin DB

== Consumer connected ==
autonumber 5
Consumer -> WebhookServer: Connect over WS

loop
    autonumber 6
    WebhookServer -> WebhookServer: Load webhooks\nfrom DB
    WebhookServer -> Consumer: Forward forwarding events
end

loop
    autonumber 8
    Consumer --> WebhookServer: Ack messages\nby webhook ID
end

@enduml
```
